subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth, wherein lieth guidance and remembrance for all the worlds. Hearken, O servant, unto that which is revealed unto thee! [3.5s]... ...O Lord! I beseech Thee by Thy name through which Thou hast shed the light of Thine effulgence upon the entire creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق و فیه هدی و ذکری للعالمین ان استمع یا عبد ما یوحی الیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
